use_cases: Primary CTA buttons on landing pages with high visual impact requirements
Interactive feature announcements in marketing campaigns
Premium product showcase sections requiring atmospheric visual effects
Creative tool interfaces where button aesthetics reinforce brand identity
Gaming and entertainment app buttons with cinematic post-processing
ai_summary: A highly sophisticated gradient button component featuring Three.js-powered 3D rendering with bloom post-processing, custom film grain shaders with vignette effects, and gradient distortion animations. The button uses GSAP for orchestration and responds to mouse position for interactive effects, creating a cinematic, premium button experience with real-time shader-based visual transformations.
